```python
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# Set scanpy settings
sc.settings.verbosity = 3
sc.settings.set_figure_params(dpi=80, facecolor='white')

# Load the data
adata = sc.read_h5ad('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/Data/dlpfc/dlpfc.h5ad')

print(f"Original data shape: {adata.shape}")
print(f"Available obs columns: {list(adata.obs.columns)}")

# Make variable names unique
adata.var_names_make_unique()

# Check if we have layer annotations
if 'layer' in adata.obs.columns:
    print(f"Layer annotations found: {adata.obs['layer'].value_counts()}")
    spatial_domains = 'layer'
else:
    print("No layer annotations found. Will perform spatial clustering to identify domains.")
    
    # Basic preprocessing for clustering
    sc.pp.filter_genes(adata, min_cells=10)
    sc.pp.filter_cells(adata, min_genes=200)
    
    # Normalize and log transform
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e4)
    sc.pp.log1p(adata)
    
    # Find highly variable genes
    sc.pp.highly_variable_genes(adata, min_mean=0.0125, max_mean=3, min_disp=0.5)
    adata.raw = adata
    adata = adata[:, adata.var.highly_variable]
    
    # PCA and neighborhood graph
    sc.pp.scale(adata, max_value=10)
    sc.tl.pca(adata, svd_solver='arpack')
    sc.pp.neighbors(adata, n_neighbors=10, n_pcs=40)
    
    # Leiden clustering
    sc.tl.leiden(adata, resolution=0.5)
    spatial_domains = 'leiden'
    
    print(f"Identified {len(adata.obs[spatial_domains].unique())} spatial clusters")

# Prepare data for differential expression analysis
if adata.raw is not None:
    adata_de = adata.raw.to_adata()
else:
    adata_de = adata.copy()

# Copy the spatial domain annotations
adata_de.obs[spatial_domains] = adata.obs[spatial_domains].copy()

# Basic preprocessing for DE analysis if not done
if 'log1p' not in adata_de.uns_keys():
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata_de, target_sum=1e4)
    sc.pp.log1p(adata_de)

print(f"\nPerforming differential expression analysis using '{spatial_domains}' as grouping variable...")

# Perform differential expression analysis between all domains
sc.tl.rank_genes_groups(adata_de, spatial_domains, method='wilcoxon', 
                        use_raw=False, n_genes=100)

# Get the results
de_results = sc.get.rank_genes_groups_df(adata_de, group=None)
print(f"Found {len(de_results)} DE gene-group pairs")

# Create summary statistics
domain_counts = adata_de.obs[spatial_domains].value_counts()
print(f"\nSpatial domain sizes:")
for domain, count in domain_counts.items():
    print(f"  {domain}: {count} spots")

# Get top DE genes per domain
print(f"\nTop 10 differentially expressed genes per spatial domain:")
domains = adata_de.obs[spatial_domains].unique()
for domain in sorted(domains):
    domain_genes = de_results[de_results['group'] == domain].head(10)
    print(f"\n{domain}:")
    for _, gene_info in domain_genes.iterrows():
        print(f"  {gene_info['names']}: log2FC={gene_info['logfoldchanges']:.2f}, "
              f"p_adj={gene_info['pvals_adj']:.2e}")

# Add DE results to adata
adata.uns['rank_genes_groups'] = adata_de.uns['rank_genes_groups'].copy()
adata.obs[spatial_domains] = adata_de.obs[spatial_domains].copy()

# Create a summary dataframe of significant DE genes
sig_genes = de_results[de_results['pvals_adj'] < 0.05]
sig_genes_summary = sig_genes.groupby('group').agg({
    'names': 'count',
    'logfoldchanges': ['mean', 'std'],
    'pvals_adj': 'mean'
}).round(3)

print(f"\nSummary of significant DE genes (p_adj < 0.05):")
print(f"Total significant DE genes: {len(sig_genes)}")
print(f"Genes per domain:")
print(sig_genes_summary)

# Save results
adata.write('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q21/run_0/output.h5ad')

print(f"\n=== ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===")
print(f"Dataset: DLPFC spatial transcriptomics")
print(f"Total spots: {adata.n_obs}")
print(f"Total genes: {adata.n_vars}")
print(f"Spatial domains identified: {len(adata.obs[spatial_domains].unique())}")
print(f"Differential expression method: Wilcoxon rank-sum test")
print(f"Total DE gene-domain pairs: {len(de_results)}")
print(f"Significant DE genes (p_adj < 0.05): {len(sig_genes)}")
print(f"Results saved with domain annotations in obs['{spatial_domains}']")
print(f"DE results stored in adata.uns['rank_genes_groups']")
```

import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# Set scanpy settings
sc.settings.verbosity = 3
sc.settings.set_figure_params(dpi=80, facecolor='white')

# Load the data
adata = sc.read_h5ad('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/Data/dlpfc/dlpfc.h5ad')

print(f"Original data shape: {adata.shape}")
print(f"Available obs columns: {list(adata.obs.columns)}")

# Make variable names unique
adata.var_names_make_unique()

# Check if we have layer annotations
if 'layer' in adata.obs.columns:
    print(f"Layer annotations found: {adata.obs['layer'].value_counts()}")
    spatial_domains = 'layer'
else:
    print("No layer annotations found. Will perform spatial clustering to identify domains.")
    
    # Basic preprocessing for clustering
    sc.pp.filter_genes(adata, min_cells=10)
    sc.pp.filter_cells(adata, min_genes=200)
    
    # Normalize and log transform
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e4)
    sc.pp.log1p(adata)
    
    # Find highly variable genes
    sc.pp.highly_variable_genes(adata, min_mean=0.0125, max_mean=3, min_disp=0.5)
    adata.raw = adata
    adata = adata[:, adata.var.highly_variable]
    
    # PCA and neighborhood graph
    sc.pp.scale(adata, max_value=10)
    sc.tl.pca(adata, svd_solver='arpack')
    sc.pp.neighbors(adata, n_neighbors=10, n_pcs=40)
    
    # Leiden clustering
    sc.tl.leiden(adata, resolution=0.5)
    spatial_domains = 'leiden'
    
    print(f"Identified {len(adata.obs[spatial_domains].unique())} spatial clusters")

# Prepare data for differential expression analysis
if adata.raw is not None:
    adata_de = adata.raw.to_adata()
else:
    adata_de = adata.copy()

# Copy the spatial domain annotations
adata_de.obs[spatial_domains] = adata.obs[spatial_domains].copy()

# Basic preprocessing for DE analysis if not done
if 'log1p' not in adata_de.uns_keys():
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata_de, target_sum=1e4)
    sc.pp.log1p(adata_de)

print(f"\nPerforming differential expression analysis using '{spatial_domains}' as grouping variable...")

# Perform differential expression analysis between all domains
sc.tl.rank_genes_groups(adata_de, spatial_domains, method='wilcoxon', 
                        use_raw=False, n_genes=100)

# Get the results
de_results = sc.get.rank_genes_groups_df(adata_de, group=None)
print(f"Found {len(de_results)} DE gene-group pairs")

# Create summary statistics
domain_counts = adata_de.obs[spatial_domains].value_counts()
print(f"\nSpatial domain sizes:")
for domain, count in domain_counts.items():
    print(f"  {domain}: {count} spots")

# Get top DE genes per domain
print(f"\nTop 10 differentially expressed genes per spatial domain:")
domains = adata_de.obs[spatial_domains].unique()
for domain in sorted(domains):
    domain_genes = de_results[de_results['group'] == domain].head(10)
    print(f"\n{domain}:")
    for _, gene_info in domain_genes.iterrows():
        print(f"  {gene_info['names']}: log2FC={gene_info['logfoldchanges']:.2f}, "
              f"p_adj={gene_info['pvals_adj']:.2e}")

# Add DE results to adata
adata.uns['rank_genes_groups'] = adata_de.uns['rank_genes_groups'].copy()
adata.obs[spatial_domains] = adata_de.obs[spatial_domains].copy()

# Create a summary dataframe of significant DE genes
sig_genes = de_results[de_results['pvals_adj'] < 0.05]
sig_genes_summary = sig_genes.groupby('group').agg({
    'names': 'count',
    'logfoldchanges': ['mean', 'std'],
    'pvals_adj': 'mean'
}).round(3)

print(f"\nSummary of significant DE genes (p_adj < 0.05):")
print(f"Total significant DE genes: {len(sig_genes)}")
print(f"Genes per domain:")
print(sig_genes_summary)

# Save results
adata.write('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q21/run_0/output.h5ad')

print(f"\n=== ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===")
print(f"Dataset: DLPFC spatial transcriptomics")
print(f"Total spots: {adata.n_obs}")
print(f"Total genes: {adata.n_vars}")
print(f"Spatial domains identified: {len(adata.obs[spatial_domains].unique())}")
print(f"Differential expression method: Wilcoxon rank-sum test")
print(f"Total DE gene-domain pairs: {len(de_results)}")
print(f"Significant DE genes (p_adj < 0.05): {len(sig_genes)}")
print(f"Results saved with domain annotations in obs['{spatial_domains}']")
print(f"DE results stored in adata.uns['rank_genes_groups']")
